game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: drag to aim and power the slingshot, release to launch, and tap the bird mid-flight to activate its special skill. Monetization includes in-app purchases for gems (premium currency), used to acquire additional bird cards, spells, or lives, alongside loot boxes for random rewards and optional rewarded video ads.
game_info.description: Launch birds from a slingshot to destroy enemy structures and defeat all pigs to win! Each bird has a unique special ability that can be activated mid-flight by pressing SPACE. Aim carefully and use physics to your advantage - ricochet off surfaces, cause chain reactions, and topple towers. Earn gems by completing levels and use them to unlock powerful spells and new bird types. Three lives per level - make each shot count!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys (LEFT/RIGHT): Aim the slingshot angle
Arrow Keys (UP/DOWN): Adjust launch power
SPACE: Launch bird (when aiming) / Activate bird's special ability (mid-flight)
Z: Use equipped spell (costs gems)
ENTER: Start game from start screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic slingshot mechanics and bird launch physics. Verify that the bird follows realistic physics after launch and collides properly with structures. Check that the game can transition through all phases correctly.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Automatically aim at medium angle (45 degrees) with medium power (50%). Launch the bird and let it fly through the level without activating special ability. Wait for the bird to land and the next turn to begin.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Bird should launch smoothly, follow a parabolic trajectory, interact with Matter.js physics objects, and eventually come to rest. The game should automatically progress to the next turn or end the level if all birds are used.

TEST_2.test_description: Test the win condition by systematically destroying all pigs and structures. Verify that collision damage is calculated correctly and that pigs are eliminated when taking sufficient damage. Check that victory screen appears when all pigs are defeated.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Launch multiple birds with optimized angles and power levels targeting pig positions. Activate special abilities mid-flight to maximize destruction. Continue until all pigs are eliminated or birds run out.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: All pigs should be destroyed through accumulated damage from collisions. Game should transition to GAME_OVER_WIN state when the last pig is eliminated. Score should reflect successful completion.

TEST_3.test_description: Test bird special abilities activation system. Verify that pressing SPACE while bird is in flight activates the unique ability and that abilities have visible effects on gameplay and physics.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Launch a bird and immediately press SPACE when it's mid-flight. Observe the special ability effect (speed boost, split into multiple birds, explosive impact, etc.). Repeat with different bird types if available.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Special ability should activate immediately upon SPACE press during flight. The ability should modify bird behavior visibly (speed increase, multiplication, explosion effect). Each ability should only activate once per bird.

TEST_4.test_description: Test the spell system and gem economy. Verify that spells can be purchased, equipped, and used during gameplay. Check that gem costs are deducted properly and that spells have meaningful effects on the level.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Accumulate gems by destroying objects. Press Z to use an equipped spell (e.g., earthquake that damages all structures, extra bird, power boost). Verify gem count decreases and spell effect is applied.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Spell should activate when Z is pressed if player has sufficient gems. Gems should be deducted from player's total. Spell effect should be visible and impact the game state (damage structures, add resources, etc.).
TEST_4.description: Test the spell system and gem economy. Verify that spells can be purchased, equipped, and used during gameplay. Check that gem costs are deducted properly and that spells have meaningful effects on the level.
TEST_4.strategy: Accumulate gems by destroying objects. Press Z to use an equipped spell (e.g., earthquake that damages all structures, extra bird, power boost). Verify gem count decreases and spell effect is applied.
TEST_4.expected: Spell should activate when Z is pressed if player has sufficient gems. Gems should be deducted from player's total. Spell effect should be visible and impact the game state (damage structures, add resources, etc.).

TEST_5.test_description: Test lose condition when player runs out of lives/birds without defeating all pigs. Verify that the game properly tracks remaining birds and transitions to game over lose state when birds are exhausted with pigs remaining.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Intentionally aim poorly or use low power to waste all three birds without hitting pigs. Launch all birds ineffectively and wait for the game to recognize the lose condition.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: After the third bird lands without eliminating all pigs, game should transition to GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Game over screen should display appropriate message and show option to restart with R key.
TEST_5.description: Test lose condition when player runs out of lives/birds without defeating all pigs. Verify that the game properly tracks remaining birds and transitions to game over lose state when birds are exhausted with pigs remaining.

TEST_6.test_description: Test structure destruction and collapse physics. Verify that wooden/stone blocks break under sufficient impact force and that towers collapse realistically when supports are removed.
TEST_6.strategy_description: Target the base supports of tower structures with high-power shots. Observe how blocks break and fall when hit with sufficient force. Check that chain reactions occur when structures collapse onto pigs.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: Blocks should break or be destroyed when collision velocity exceeds their durability threshold. Structures should collapse following realistic physics. Falling debris should damage pigs through secondary collisions.

TEST_7.test_description: Test pause functionality and game state preservation. Verify that pressing ESC pauses physics simulation and gameplay, and that resuming continues from the exact same state without any jumps or glitches.
TEST_7.strategy_description: Launch a bird mid-flight and immediately press ESC to pause. Wait a few seconds, then press ESC again to resume. Verify bird continues flight smoothly from paused position.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: When paused, all physics should freeze and "PAUSED" overlay should appear. Upon resume, game should continue exactly where it left off with no position jumps, velocity changes, or timing issues.
